description_long: This is an ornate, vintage-style armchair featuring a carved wooden frame with a natural finish. The seat, backrest, and armrests are upholstered in a cream-colored fabric adorned with a blue floral pattern, giving it a classic and elegant appearance. The backrest is gently curved and framed with wood, while the armrests are also wooden with upholstered tops for comfort. The legs are cabriole-shaped, adding to the antique aesthetic and providing stability. Decorative nailhead trim outlines the upholstery, enhancing the chair's refined look. This armchair would be well-suited for placement in urban parks, sidewalk cafes, or stylish public waiting areas.
description: A vintage-style armchair with a carved wooden frame and cream upholstery featuring a blue floral pattern. Cabriole legs and decorative nailhead trim complete its elegant, classic look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved wooden armrest and the floral upholstery on the seat and backrest.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wooden frame and the back panel of the upholstered backrest.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other armrest and the detailed woodwork along the frame.
description_view_3: Front view showcasing the full floral upholstery on the seat and backrest, as well as both armrests.
attribute_armrest_design: wooden and curved with upholstered tops
attribute_backrest_style: medium-height, curved, framed with wood, upholstered with floral fabric
attribute_upholstery_pattern: blue floral print on cream fabric
